decisions.summary: Workspace reused from PAN-1788 planning session; replaced .pan/continue.json with PAN-1498 state. Main-side spec for PAN-1498 exists at .pan/specs/2026-05-25-PAN-1498-...vbrief.json and is canonical.

Added '## Live Code Path Traces' between '## Findings' and '## Non-blocking Notes' in roles/review-requirements.md, with verbatim example, sentinel text, and REVIEWER_FAILED enforcement note. Updated roles/review.md step 6 to reference the new section. Created tests/unit/roles/review-requirements.test.ts snapshot test.

Implemented validateRequirementsTrace as a pure function in src/lib/cloister/review-requirements-validator.ts with fixture-driven tests in src/lib/cloister/__tests__/review-requirements-validator.test.ts. Added ten markdown fixtures under tests/fixtures/review-requirements/.

Added 'pan review validate-trace <file>' hidden subcommand and registered it under the 'pan review' group. Wired validator into launcher-generator.ts for subRole='requirements' with fallback to legacy file-present signal when the CLI is unavailable. Added unit tests for both the shim and the launcher-generator branch.

Added end-to-end test tests/unit/cloister/review-requirements-trace-e2e.test.ts that drives the actual generated launcher script with stubbed claude/pan binaries, asserting REVIEWER_FAILED with validator reason, REVIEWER_READY on valid trace, and fallback warning when pan is unavailable.

hazards.summary: This workspace previously held PAN-1788 continue.json; ensure all bd commands use -l pan-1498 to avoid cross-issue confusion.
hazards.mitigation: Use bd list -l pan-1498, bd ready -l pan-1498, and never rely on unfiltered bd output.

resumePoint.description: All four beads complete. Run full quality gates (typecheck, lint, test), push, and call pan done PAN-1498.

sessionHistory.note: Resumed PAN-1498 work; replaced stale PAN-1788 continue.json. Reading main-side spec and starting first bead.
